message:
fix: move RPC use-import to top and expand TUI markup tag character set

main.rs: Move `use futures::FutureExt` from between the ctrlc handler
setup and the rpc_task binding to the top of run_rpc_mode(), satisfying
the items_after_statements clippy lint. No behavioral change.

tui.rs: Expand the set of characters allowed inside rich_rust markup
tags in strip_markup() to include URL-safe and common punctuation:
? & % + ~ ; ! * ' ( ). Previously these characters would cause the
heuristic to reject a bracket sequence as a tag, leaving raw markup
in stripped output. This fixes rendering of content containing URLs
or complex expressions inside markup tags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
